'''[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Saychel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an officer within the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. He once worked with a [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] safe house located in the [[Senate District/Legends|Government District]] alongside [[Showolter]], and was in contact with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he was sent to [[Nim Drovis]] to help in the interrogation of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Priest/Legends|priestess]] [[Elan]] and her [[familiar]], [[Vergere]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
